summary: Frontend-only validation of (1) Pro Preview Banner for free/non-pro users and (2) Soundscapes preset row. All 9 scenarios in the request passed. Free-user banner renders above the 3-col grid with all 5 Pro category chips (Brainwave & Specials, φ Golden Stack, Sleep Mode, Ambient Layers, Soundscapes) and the 'Try free for 7 days →' CTA; CTA navigates to Account Dashboard (plan-card visible). Admin: banner NOT rendered, soundscapes-pro-badge + soundscapes-unlock-cta absent, grid not dimmed. Soundscapes section sits below Brainwave & Specials in the left sidebar, with all 6 keys (forest-rain, cosmic-drift, deep-sleep, morning-focus, heart-open, earth-pulse) present. soundscapes-unlock-cta routes to Account Dashboard for free users. Pro/admin tap on soundscape-forest-rain: current-frequency=6.0Hz, ambient-forest-slider=0.6, ambient-rain-slider=0.35, all others=0, Pause icon shown, timer counting from 09:58. soundscape-cosmic-drift: freq=963.0Hz, ocean=0.4, bowls=0.5, prior forest/rain zeroed (clean replace, no bleed). After Solfeggio-528 tap mid-soundscape: freq retunes to 528.0Hz and ambient layers ocean(0.4) + bowls(0.5) PERSIST exactly. Account Dashboard 'Pro unlocks' lists 'Soundscapes — 6 curated multi-layer mixes' as a bullet (admin + free both see it).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx L256-271 selectSoundscape: correctly (a) audioEngine.stop if playing, (b) disable goldenStack + force sine + binaural=0, (c) setFrequency to s.freq, (d) zero EVERY ambient via Object.keys(audioEngine.ambient).forEach -> setAmbient(k,0), (e) apply s.ambient mix, (f) clear breathwork+sleep, (g) start. Sequence guarantees the prior soundscape's layers cannot bleed and Solfeggio re-selection only re-tunes (no ambient reset). Verified empirically: cosmic-drift after forest-rain had forest=0, rain=0; Solfeggio 528 after cosmic-drift kept ocean=0.4 + bowls=0.5.

Dashboard.jsx L335-361 pro-preview-banner uses !isPro guard so admin/pro users do not see it (confirmed: count=0 on admin). Banner z-10 sits above aurora-bg and grain layers — no overlap with the 3-col grid below.

Dashboard.jsx L530-583 soundscapes-section: identical UX pattern to specials-section (lock icon + PRO badge + dimmed grid + absolute-positioned unlock CTA). pointer-events-none + absolute CTA means free-user soundscape clicks are caught by the overlay rather than the inner buttons — de-facto paywall path. Grid class string verified: 'opacity-45 pointer-events-none select-none' for free users, none for admin.
AccountDashboard.jsx L211-220 proFeatures includes 'Soundscapes — 6 curated multi-layer mixes' as the 2nd bullet — rendered as a Check-icon list under 'Pro unlocks' (admin path verified).

No console errors observed during the run. No regressions on existing Solfeggio (still free), Brainwave & Specials (still Pro-gated), Golden Stack/Sleep/Breathwork/Custom Freq/Ambient (still Pro-gated).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 9 scenarios in the review request passed

test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / admin123. Free user registered per-run: test_nopro_<ts>@example.com / Testpass123!
seed_data_creation: Registered one fresh non-pro user during the run for free-user paths.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soundscapes is mounted in Dashboard.jsx L530-583 (after specials-section L474-528). The free-user paywall is the same overlay pattern: absolute-positioned soundscapes-unlock-cta over an opacity-45 pointer-events-none grid — the overlay catches all clicks and routes via onOpenAccount. selectSoundscape (L256-271) zeros every ambient before applying the new mix; this is the contract that prevents bleed across soundscapes and preserves ambients when a Solfeggio preset is tapped afterwards. AccountDashboard.jsx L211-220 proFeatures lists the Soundscapes bullet.
